summary: Transportation network link data for Alameda TANA model with segment IDs, drive access, assignment class, and useclass by time period.
Precipitation zone polygons for Bay Area planning projects with minimum and maximum precipitation values.
ACS state-level commute travel time data for Bay Area workers by time bucket from 10-14 minutes to 90+ minutes.
ACS census tract community vulnerability metrics for Bay Area including vehicle access, senior population, disability rates, and poverty.
Pavement infrastructure data for Bay Area with category, support, construction data, route, and location.
High density overlay zone polygons for Bay Area from 2013 with names and area geometry.
Census block racial composition data for Bay Area showing 18+ population by race and Hispanic/non-Hispanic origin.
Land use polygon layer for Bay Area with line color, fill color, source, and modification dates.
Environmental data polygons for Bay Area with source agency, scale, and comment data.
ACS census tract nativity data for Bay Area children by living arrangement, parent nativity, and age group.
Census block group demographic data for Bay Area showing 18+ racial composition and group quarters population.
Transportation Analysis Zone (TAZ) boundaries for Bay Area with 1,454 zone model assignments and county data.
Santa Clara County address data with street type, directional prefix, address type, ZIP code, and jurisdiction.
Bay Area Vital Signs county-level population data by year with percent change from 1970.
ACS county-level veteran/non-veteran civilian population data for Bay Area by age and sex.
Great Valley (Gordon Valley) fault earthquake shaking intensity zones for Bay Area with MMI classifications.
ACS county-level computer and internet access data for Bay Area civilian labor force by employment status.
BART station locations in Bay Area with class, agency name, rule ID, and station name.
ACS county-level disability, poverty, and limited English proficiency data for Bay Area population.
Maximum building height zones for Bay Area with intensity zones, height limits, density, and use codes.
All Bay Area transportation projects with GPLU identity, lead agency, join key, project type, and county.
Sand Creek Focus Area boundary polygon for Bay Area planning with name, area, and perimeter.
ACS county-level household vehicle availability data for Bay Area by household size from 1-person to 4+-person households.
Bay Area zoning data from 2022 with APN, lot size, zoning designation, building area, and address.
ACS state-level household internet access data for Bay Area by income bracket, tracking dial-up and non-subscription rates.
ACS census tract birth rate data for Bay Area women by age group tracking births in the past 12 months.
Opportunity and resource areas for Bay Area at the census block group level with economic domain scores and CPI data.
Bay Area parcels with unknown status, general plan designation, zone code, editor, and creation dates.
ACS county-level homeownership data for Bay Area by householder education level, distinguishing bachelor's degree holders from others.
Census block-level racial composition for Bay Area tracking 18+ population across single-race and two-race combinations.
Neighborhood polygons for Bay Area jurisdiction with neighborhood names and source data.
Bay Area PDAs and PDA eligible areas with connected community percentages, transit-rich acreage, and SCS status.
Bay Area PDA total footprint comparing 2013 and 2017 PDA boundaries with lead agencies.
Building records for Bay Area with type, subtype, address, ID, and revision dates.
Hospital locations in Bay Area with addresses, phone numbers, REDDINET IDs, and postal information.
